title: What Biden will tell Xi during his first sitdown with the Chinese leader
description: President Biden is expected to address mounting tensions over Taiwan in his first face-to-face meeting with President Xi Jinping of China on Monday.
keywords: News, china, g20 summit, joe biden, nancy pelosi, republicans, taiwan, xi jinping
